name: The Green 973
about: The Green 973 is an indoor golf facility in Sparta, New Jersey, offering a year-round golf experience. It features multiple simulator bays, including flat widescreen and one curved screen, alongside an indoor mini putting green. The venue provides a community space for all experience levels to practice, take lessons, and host private events. Memberships are available in tiered packages (Birdie, Eagle, Ace) that offer discounted simulator time and priority booking benefits. The facility is suitable for casual play, individual practice, and group events, with amenities designed for both learning and socializing.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to golf regardless of weather
Tiered membership packages tailored to different play styles
State-of-the-art simulator technology for realistic play
Dedicated indoor putting green for short game practice
Flexible event space for group gatherings and parties

food_and_drink.notes: Can cater from nearby restaurants for private events
No information on alcohol service provided

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: The Green 973 is a golf simulator facility, so you will need golf clubs to play. They offer club rentals, though it is recommended to bring your own equipment if possible.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: For general play, external food and drink policies are not specified. For private events, the facility can cater from nearby restaurants to provide food and beverage service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes depends on the simulator software and number of players. The website does not provide a specific duration, but typical indoor simulator golf rounds take between 1.5 to 2.5 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Green 973 is kid-friendly. They host kids' events, offer junior golf lessons, and welcome families in their community-oriented environment.
